{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323040548ABB3B2B3F731450CAE37"}"},"total":3997},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7147705930422174501","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"爽文里算是很不错的一本书了！作者加油✊多更新呀！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1664205117,"group_id":"7134235533642828807","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyBDMyeGf13VQ6zkn3p1bxg=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/c67937f66f664fa4a6992ab167ec5c94~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776794144&x-signature=pJQ9i7RNF54Pl8%2F9oWrIl5NrhK8%3D","user_id":"7001864343","user_name":"山高狐狸野，还很皮。"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"7001864343","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7134235533642828807","book_info":{"abstract":"（新书已发布，《废物皇子开局我觉醒了大反派系统》希望大家喜欢）
天武大陆，武力至上，有绝世高手，翻江倒海，逆转乾坤。主角穿越而来，获得召唤系统，开局召唤西门吹雪，组建罗网杀手组织。主角信仰苟之一道，躲在幕后操控天下。
这里有朝廷，青龙会，圣地，世家，剑宗，道门，魂殿，魔教各种势力错综复杂。主角藏于幕后，操控天下。（召唤人物：弃天帝，玄天邪帝，独孤求败，江玉燕，东方不败，不良帅，六剑奴等）
（幕后流，系统流，）（注意是幕后，不是一直在写主角多牛逼，主角戏份没那么多）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/8e6598f295151acd189e6cd5d930375e","author":"枫落江南","author_id":"","book_id":"7134235533642828807","book_name":"开局创建冥殿，横行诸天","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#184880","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":850,"name":"无脑爽","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=850&name=无脑爽&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7134236449058226728","read_count":"51953","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1933321"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.5","serial_count":"925","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,架空,东方玄幻,无脑爽,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/91b055574906b8803f53cf41db226ef3~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779393948&x-signature=BhqKjQt6aE8IreZC5OttWWSuobI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1460622824571424","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_
